violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (scoops) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
Pork and sauces were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Prep Units 2. Shelving: walk-in cooler, prep units, prep tables New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a hand sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

The hoods in the kitchen area have an accumulation of grease buildup and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Per interview with PIC, service is scheduled for 5/27. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The hand-washing sink in the front kitchen area was blocked by a box, aluminum pans, and other items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC provided paper towels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

A container of beef was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC moved to a shelf during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was above 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for chlorine sanitizer is 50-100 ppm. PIC diluted sanitizer during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units, prep unit gaskets, walk-in gaskets, walk-in fans, walk-in ceilings and walls, and ventilation hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a hand sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
3 light bulbs were observed missing at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
